notes: A clean, sorry-free file with zero heartbeat overrides; the ordAtInfty group (4 theorems) and the Verschiebung infrastructure group (pullback_range, pullback_pow_mem, mulByInt_pullback_pow_witness_iff, frobeniusIsog_pullback_eq_pow_pow, frobeniusIsog_mulByInt_pullback_comm, frobeniusIsog_universal_commute_isog) are parked/forward-looking with no external callers found in the project, while frobeniusIsog, frobeniusIsog_pullback_apply, frobeniusIsog_degree, and frobeniusIsog_pullback_universal_commute are load-bearing API used extensively across GapSpines, Hasse/*, Verschiebung/*, and WeilPairing/*.
